item.description:
# Clip 1.3.2
Clip 1.3.2 improves Live Share viewer reliability and corrects Retina window sizing.
## Live Share
- Continue gathering usable ICE candidates when one STUN server reports a per-server timeout, while still failing when the peer connection itself fails. - Prevent native viewer windows from entering an invalid fullscreen/tab state that could crash the viewer. - Keep Retina captures encoded at full pixel resolution while presenting them at the source Mac's logical window size in both native and web viewers. - Preserve logical source geometry across reconnects, codec changes, and legacy hosts that do not send the new optional metadata.
The matching `1.3.2` Live Share server image updates the hosted web viewer. The signaling and media routing protocol remains backward compatible.
## Requirements
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon. This build uses the same stable Apple Development identity as previous updater releases.
